description: baseline
n_batch=512 n_ubatch=512 n_threads=16 n_threads_batch=16 - no meaningful gain
type_k=8 type_v=8 q8_0 KV cache - unsupported type in this build, context creation failed
GGML_CUDA_GRAPH_OPT=1 - context creation failed (type_k=8 leftover bug)
GGML_CUDA_GRAPH_OPT=1 (clean) - no improvement
GGML_CUDA_FORCE_MMQ=1 - no improvement
remove torch import - equal performance, simpler code (simplification win)
rebuild llama-cpp-python from git main (sm_80) - same perf, fresher code base
GGML_CUDA_FORCE_CUBLAS=1 - no improvement
flash_attn=True (new build) - 18% gain, 640 tokens generated naturally
flash_attn=True + n_batch=512 n_ubatch=512 - no additional gain
flash_attn=True + GGML_CUDA_DISABLE_GRAPHS=1 - much worse, graphs are essential
flash_attn=True + GGML_CUDA_DISABLE_FUSION=1 - marginal loss, fusion helps
flash_attn=True + GGML_CUDA_FORCE_CUBLAS=1 - no improvement
LlamaPromptLookupDecoding(ngram=2 pred=2) - scores allocation bug in llama.py (n_past+n_tokens > n_batch)
LlamaPromptLookupDecoding after patching llama.py scores bug - MoE batching overhead worse than gain
n_ctx=2048 - no improvement, attention not the bottleneck
n_batch=2048 + flash_attn - no improvement
type_k=30 type_v=30 bf16 KV cache - much worse, flash_attn doesn't support bf16 KV well
GGML_CUDA_REGISTER_HOST=1 - 0.3% gain is noise
temperature=0 greedy - hit max_tokens (2000), longer context = slower
